text: Science has a clearer story about vaccine myocarditis than social media. Vaccine myocarditis is rare, especially compared to the risk of COVID-19. Data shows higher rates in young males, but cases are still infrequent. Studies reveal myocarditis rates are much lower than risks of severe COVID. Informed choices protect us. Understanding risks empowers us. Stay curious. Follow for more science insights!
